raw_consumer_statement:
A scammer who was unauthorized to use my credit card charged my Citigroup credit card more than {$3000.00} to XXXX on my credit card. None of those charges appear on my bills. I am XXXX XXXX XXXX widow and the thought of me charging {$3000.00} for technology is simply perposterous. I have repeatedly provided my statements to Citigroup ( my credit card ) but they refuse to address the issue. 

I contacted Citigroup the day I identified the issue and seeking to resolve this issue. 

I have contacted XXXX over 6 times and each time they confirmned none of those charges are against my account. Despite this Citigroup has refused to resolve the issue. I have communicated with Citigroup over a dozen times all to no avail. 

In addition, Citigroup 's fraud department sent me to their dispute department and their dispute department is sending me back the fraud department.
